title: Disney CEO Could CHANGE EVERYTHING in Disney World Villains Land?!
description:
It's being rumored that new Disney CEO Josh D'Amaro is going to "reimagine" Disney World's upcoming Villains' land as the original plan isn't up to snuff compared to Unviersal's Epic Universe. Then we talk about D'Amaro as the pick for CEO in general, and whether or not it's a good thing.

Watch the podcast episodes on YouTube and all major podcast hosts including Spotify.

CLOWNFISH TV is an independent, opinionated news and commentary podcast that covers Entertainment and Tech from a consumer’s point of view. We talk about Gaming, Comics, Anime, TV, Movies, Animation and more. Hosted by Kneon and Geeky Sparkles.
